document.docAuthor: Chigray, Svetlana N., Nabozhenko, Maxim V., Chigray, Ivan A. & Abakumov, Evgeny V.
document.masterDocTitle: A revision of the Palaearctic Pimeliini (Coleoptera: Tenebrionidae): a comparative analysis and systematic position of Eastern European and Asian taxa with dorso-lateral eyes

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: A revision of the Palaearctic Pimeliini (Coleoptera: Tenebrionidae): a comparative analysis and systematic position of Eastern European and Asian taxa with dorso-lateral eyes

mods:name.mods:affiliation: St. Petersburg State University, 16 line of Vasilevskiy Island, 29, St. Petersburg 199178 Russia.

Precaspian Institute of Biological Resources of the Daghestan Federal Research Centre of the Russian Academy of Sciences, M. Gadzhiev str., 45, Makhachkala, Republic of Dagestan 367000 Russia. & Dagestan State University, M. Gadzhiev str., 43 a, Makhachkala, Republic of Dagestan 367000 Russia. & Severtsov Institute of ecology and evolution of the Russian Academy of sciences, Leninsky Prospect, 33, Moscow 119071 Russia.
Zoological Institute of the Russian Academy of Sciences, Universitetskaya Emb. 1, St. Petersburg 199034 Russia.
St. Petersburg State University, 16 line of Vasilevskiy Island, 29, St. Petersburg 199178 Russia.

subSubSection.paragraph:
KAZAKHSTAN • 6 ♂♂ , 4 ♀♀ ; Bol’shiye Barsuki ;
28 Apr. 1904
; V.A. Dubyansky leg.; ZIN
•
4 ♂♂ , 3 ♀♀ ; same collection data as for preceding;
20 May 1906
; L. Berg leg.; ZIN
•
2 ♂♂ , 1 ♀ ; near Temir ;
1 May 1905
; B.P. Uvarov leg.; ZIN
•
1 ♀ ; Temir , Kumkuduk ;
30 May 1908
; D.N. Borodin leg.; ZIN
•
1 ♀ ; same collection data as for preceding; B.P. Uvarov leg.; ZIN
•
8 ♂♂ , 6 ♀♀ ; near Shalkar [Chelkar] , Bol’shiye Barsuki ; N.V. Androsov leg.; ZIN

2–3 June 1949
; K.G. Romadina leg.; ZIN

23 Jun. 1949
; L.V. Arnol’di leg.; ZIN

3 May 1951
; L.V. Arnol’di leg.; ZIN

1 ♂ , 1 ♀ ; same collection data as for preceding; K.G. Romadina leg.; ZIN

9 Jun. 1952
; L.V. Arnol’di leg.; ZIN

60 km NW of Zhanaarka
;
19 May 1962
; L.V. Arnol’di leg.; ZIN

sands 12 km N of Kensu
;

; L.V. Arnol’di leg.; ZIN

•

.

RUSSIA • 8 ♂♂ , 9 ♀♀ ; “Sibir. occ.” [ Eastern Siberia ]; ZIN

; A.K. Becker leg.; ZIN

18 May 2013
; I.V. Shokhin leg.; CMN

; Chernavin leg.; ZIN

; CMN

; M.V. Nabozhenko , D.A. Dubovikoff , L.V. Markitan leg.; ZMSFU , CMN
.

caption.paragraph:
Fig. 21.
Platyope grumi ( Semenov, 1893 )
, genitalia (ZIN). A . Tegmen of aedeagus, ventrally. B . Ditto, dorsally. C . Ditto, laterally. D . Median lobe, ventrally. E . Ditto, dorsally. F . Ditto, laterally. G . Spiculum gastrale, ventrally. H . Ditto, ventro-lateral view. I . ♂, inner sternite VIII. J . ♀, inner sternite VIII and spiculum ventrale. K . ♀, paralectotype?, ovipositor, ventrally. L . Ditto, dorsally. M . Ditto, laterally. Not to scale. Abbreviations: see Material and methods.

subSubSection.paragraph: South of the European part of Russia ( Rostov , Stavropol , Volgograd , Astrakhan regions, Kalmykia , Chechnya , Dagestan ,), North Kazakhstan from Volga River to Zaysan Lake.
